name: GST Service Adapter
description: Integrates with GST APIs for GSTIN verification, GST return filing status, and ITR fetch for business loan underwriting.

versions.notes: GSTIN validation and basic return status fetch.
Enriched GST profile with ITR data and annual turnover computation.

hooks.name: gstin_validate
hooks.description: Validates GSTIN format before API call

hooks.name: turnover_compute
hooks.description: Computes aggregate annual turnover from returns

hooks.name: risk_score_enrich
hooks.description: Enriches response with filing compliance risk score

hooks.name: retry_with_pan
hooks.description: Retries using PAN if GSTIN lookup fails
